methods.name: create_shares
methods.desc: Create Shares ASA if creator and shares not initialized, configure globals~

methods.name: claim_shares
methods.desc: Claim the actual shares ASA to wallet, the asset is frozen and no methods exist for trading at this time

methods.name: add_fees
methods.desc: This method can remain public, if someone wants to just dump 10 Algo + into the share system I don't think anyone would object

methods.name: simulate_claim_fees
methods.desc: Read-only method for simulating fees earned so far for a user

methods.name: simulate_creator_claim_fees
methods.desc: Read-only method for simulating fees earned so far for creator
